name: Cloud Firefox VPS
postCreateCommand:
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y firefox-esr && mkdir -p /home/vscode/.config/xfce4/autostart && echo -e '[Desktop Entry]
Type=Application
Exec=firefox-esr --kiosk
' > /home/vscode/.config/xfce4/autostart/firefox.desktop && echo 'Firefox installed and configured to start in kiosk mode'
